scripts.build: bun run build:runtime-core && bun run build:runtime-dom && bun run build:runtime-worker && bun run build:runtime-blazor
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run build && bun run test
scripts.test: bun run test:runtime-core && bun run test:layer1
scripts.test:layer1: bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/json/tokenizer.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/document/structuralIndex.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/document/documentSession.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/document/preparedDocumentRuntimeClient.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/document/preparedSchemaOverlay.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/viewport/viewportModel.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/navigation/pathReveal.test.ts && bun ../../tests/BlazorJsonVisualizer.Runtime.Tests/rendering/jsonViewRenderer.test.ts
